interactions.clinical_effect: 增强镇静和呼吸抑制作用

interactions.clinical_effect: 显著增加托莫西汀血药浓度和不良反应（心动过速、失眠）

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加心动过缓、房室传导阻滞及撤药反跳性高血压风险

interactions.mechanism: 叠加的5-HT和NE活性

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加苯丙胺血药浓度和毒性风险
interactions.mechanism: 尿液碱化减少苯丙胺类排泄

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加肾功能损害风险
interactions.mechanism: 叠加肾小管毒性

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加didanosine浓度和胰腺炎/乳酸性酸中毒风险
interactions.mechanism: 替诺福韦增加didanosine磷酸化代谢物的浓度

interactions.clinical_effect: 替诺福韦浓度升高，增加肾毒性风险；同时降低atazanavir浓度

interactions.drug_b: polyvalent cations (antacids containing Al/Mg, calcium, iron, zinc supplements)
interactions.clinical_effect: 降低bictegravir吸收和抗病毒疗效

interactions.drug_b: CYP3A4 / P-gp inducers (rifampin, carbamazepine, phenytoin, St. John's wort)
interactions.clinical_effect: 显著降低bictegravir和tenofovir alafenamide浓度，导致治疗失败
interactions.mechanism: 诱导CYP3A4和P-gp加速药物代谢与排泄

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加tenofovir浓度，潜在加重肾损伤
interactions.mechanism: 抑制肠道P-gp外排增加吸收

interactions.drug_b: polyvalent cation-containing products (antacids, calcium, iron, zinc supplements)
interactions.clinical_effect: 降低dolutegravir吸收和疗效
interactions.mechanism: 螯合减少口服吸收，需间隔2-6小时服用
